001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil;
004import java.util.Collection;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
007
008/**
009 * Repository interface for managing fossil reference data. Provides asynchronous methods for
010 * retrieving and inserting fossil types.
011 */
012public interface FossilRepository {
013
014  /**
015   * Retrieves a random set of unassigned fossils (not yet associated with any collected fossil)
016   * asynchronously.
017   *
018   * @param limit Maximum number of fossils to retrieve.
019   * @return CompletableFuture containing list of unassigned fossils.
020   */
021  CompletableFuture<List<Fossil>> getUnassignedFossils(int limit);
022
023  /**
024   * Retrieves a fossil by its primary key ID asynchronously.
025   *
026   * @param id Fossil ID.
027   * @return CompletableFuture containing the fossil, or {@code null} if not found.
028   */
029  CompletableFuture<Fossil> getById(long id);
030
031  /**
032   * Inserts a batch of fossils into the database asynchronously.
033   *
034   * @param fossils Collection of fossils to insert.
035   * @return CompletableFuture containing {@code true} if insert was successful, {@code false}
036   *     otherwise.
037   */
038  CompletableFuture<Boolean> batchInsert(Collection<Fossil> fossils);
039}
